name: What proof do I need for back injury workers comp claim?
description: Med reports, employer notice, witnesses, imaging—document from day 1[1].

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for back injury workers comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Med reports, employer notice, witnesses, imaging—document from day 1[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Doctor's reports linking injury to work, incident reports, witness statements, wage records.** Photos or videos help[1]. **Key factors:** Timely medical eval, objective tests (MRI), consistent history. **Practical guidance:** Report day-of, follow treatment, log symptoms/mileage. Avoid social media posts. Request personnel file for safety records. **Utah trials use this evidence[1].**
